meta.title: LLM Local — Local LLM Inference Machines
meta.description: Assembled, tested, 1-year-warrantied local LLM inference machines. 32GB–128GB VRAM to run large models on your own hardware.

hero.headline: Run LLMs on your own hardware.
hero.subheadline: Fully assembled, tested, PSE-converted, 1-year-warrantied machines — for about the cost of DIY parts. 32GB to 128GB of VRAM for large models, on your desk.
hero.valueProp: A fully assembled, tested, PSE-converted, 1-year-warrantied unit for about the cost of buying DIY parts in Japan.

machines.title: Machines
machines.subtitle: Pick by workload and VRAM — local LLM inference machines.

comparison.title: How we compare
comparison.subtitle: We compete at 32GB+ VRAM, where price-performance matters most.

estimate.title: How much VRAM do I need?
estimate.description: Estimates based on 4-bit quantization, 8K context, single-user, NVIDIA GPU.
estimate.disclaimer: Based on 4-bit quantization, 8K context, single-user, NVIDIA GPU.

compatibility.disclaimer: Based on 4-bit quantization, 8K context, single-user, NVIDIA GPU.

cost.title: No Recurring Costs
